title: Report: Uber Replaces 10% of Customer Service Staff With AI. What Could Go Wrong?
summary: Both measures are reportedly intended to fix Uber’s fragmented customer service operations and improve overall efficiency. “Our organization has become too complex and siloed,” Megha Yethadka, Uber’s VP of global community operations, wrote in an internal memo viewed by Bloomberg.
